creator: Alex Hughes | Easy Low-Cal Recipes
source_text:
Hot Honey Cajun Beef Folded Wrap

That crunch at the end though 🤭 

If you love a quick & easy fakeaway, this one’s for you 🤌🏼 Sticky hot honey cajun spiced beef, homemade ranch, melted cheddar, chilli heatwave doritos and lettuce, all folded into a tortilla and toasted until golden and crispy.

Ingredients (serves 2): 
225g 5% lean beef mince 1½ tsp Cajun seasoning ½ tsp smoked paprika 1 tsp garlic granules Salt & black pepper 25g honey 1 tsp hot sauce ½ tsp mild chilli flakes (optional)

Ranch (or use shop bought)
50g 0% Greek yoghurt 20g lighter mayonnaise 1 tsp garlic granules ½ tsp onion granules ¼ tsp dried parsley ⅛ tsp dried dill ¼ tsp dried chives 1 tsp white wine vinegar Salt & black pepper 2 tsp warm water

To Serve
2 large flour tortillas 40g reduced fat mature cheddar, grated 25g Chilli heatwave doritos  2 handfuls shredded lettuce

💞Whisk together all the ranch ingredients until smooth.

💞Fry the beef mince until browned. Season with the Cajun seasoning, smoked paprika, garlic granules, salt and black pepper. Cook for a minute. 

💞Mix the honey, hot sauce & chilli flakes. Pour most of it into the pan reserving some to drizzle at the end.

💞Lay each tortilla flat and make a cut from the centre to the edge. Add the ranch and lettuce, then the beef, Doritos and cheese. 

💞Fold each quarter over the next to create a triangle. If any filling pops out while folding just add it back into the centre of the wrap.

💞Toast in a dry frying pan over a medium heat for 2-3 minutes per side, until the cheese has melted.

💞Drizzle over any remaining hot honey on the beef & serve with any leftover ranch for dipping. 

Calories per portion: 529 | Protein: 38.3g | Fat: 16.3g | Carbs: 56.9g

•

Lay each tortilla flat and make a cut from the centre to the edge. Add the ranch and lettuce, then the beef, Doritos and cheese.
Fold each quarter over the next to create a triangle. If any filling pops out while folding just add it back into the centre of the wrap.
Toast in a dry frying pan over a medium heat for 2-3 minutes per side, until the cheese has melted.
Drizzle over any remaining hot honey on the beef & serve with any leftover ranch for dipping.

Unicode line separators delimit the three local ingredient components.
Accepted after extending the shared imperative vocabulary with fry, lay, and toast; no creator identity or exact recipe phrase is used.
